categories.name: Reentrancy
categories.description: External call before state update allows recursive entry
categories.example_pattern: withdraw() calls .call{value: amount}() before setting balance = 0

categories.name: Integer Overflow/Underflow
categories.description: Arithmetic operations exceed type bounds (pre-0.8.0 Solidity)

categories.name: Unchecked Call Return Value
categories.description: External call return value not checked

categories.name: Unprotected Ether Withdrawal
categories.example_pattern: withdraw() function without onlyOwner or auth check

categories.name: Unprotected SELFDESTRUCT
categories.fix_pattern: Restrict to owner or remove entirely

categories.name: Delegatecall to Untrusted Callee
categories.description: delegatecall to user-controlled address allows code injection
categories.fix_pattern: Use libraries with fixed addresses only

categories.name: Transaction Order Dependence
categories.description: Logic depends on transaction order, enabling front-running

categories.name: DoS with Block Gas Limit
categories.description: Unbounded loop can exceed gas limit, locking funds
categories.example_pattern: for loop over dynamic array of unbounded size
